title: JsdSolar G-command ASCII inverter communication protocol
summary: Local protocol document describes an inverter ASCII command family using carriage-return-terminated commands and responses such as GPDAT<n>, GPV, GBAT, GCHG, GOP, GLINE, GINV, GWS, GTMP, FAN???, SVFW, GMOD, F, and BL. It confirms the SmartValue capture is a distinct G-command protocol family rather than PI30 ASCII and documents read-only telemetry field positions.
